firmware.title: AC8-H853A-R-TR-210826V1599-220421V2156_20220421181547
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: AC8-H853A-R-TR-220421V2156
Changed Functions:
1.Upgraded the operating system to HiOS8.0, with 1700+ optimized points.
2.Added smart OS features to achieve quicker app start and more convenient message reminders.
3.Upgraded Phone Cloner to support background transfer and synchronization of settings, home screen, and app data for more third-party apps.
4.Upgraded App Twin to support WeChat and Line.
5.Removed the app Ella according to Google security configuration requirements
6.Supported multitasking scenes in multitasking windows.
7.Upgraded Video Player to support more file formats and optimize layout and playing effect.
8.Upgraded XArena and Dar-link to bring more lively game experience.
9.Added MemFusion V2.1.
10.Updated Google Security Patch and updated GMS.
Optimized Issues:
1.Optimized the stability issue from user feedback.
2.Improved the system performance.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the TECNO spot forum (http://bbs.tecno-mobile.com) for more information.
